title: Amethyst Tools Mod
description: Gives you an option to upgrade equipment with amethyst
body:
![mod showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/035c93149e0986ec013c4790bd306efc3160dcb9.jpeg)
Do you regard that amethyst is useless in new minecraft versions? Then, let's change it!

This simple mod makes you able to upgrade your equipment with amethyst and gives this resource a new life!

Upgrade iron, diamond, netherite equipment!
Upgrade arrows, trident!
Full-configurable with .toml file! 
Vanilla-friendly (｡◕‿◕｡)

![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eea8aa20780f838653f6625af6667b67af48dc6.gif)


Amethyst grants you:
ARMOR:

+1 armor
+1 armor toughness
x1.2 durability
+5 enchantability

TOOLS:
+2 damage
+1 digspeed
x1.2 durability
+5 enchantability

ARROWS:
+3 damage
1.5x duration of glowing for spectral arrow

TRIDENT:
+2 damage from attack
+3 damage from throwing

And don't forget that any of these values can be changed using config :)


You can redistribute it anywhere, add in your modpacks and make addons following Apache 2.0 License.

Developed by Kitoglav, Textured by Muffch.

2022, Macarons Team

If you have any questions - you can PM me or write in discord (Kitoglav#0262)
